ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-09-2009. NOV-14-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE FEB-19-2009.
ARBITRATOR DIRK MCKENZIE SCHENKKAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-20-2009 THROUGH MAY-21-2009.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFF(S)/CROSS-DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR, DIRK MCKENZIE SCHENKKAN (UNTIMELY); COULD NOT BE PROCESSED.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. THE JUN-16-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MARTIN J RUANE.
ARBITRATOR PAUL JOHN DION APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-13-2009 THROUGH JUN-11-2009.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-07-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
